room.caption: [NH3] Third Floor

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1008 newMapY=207 toRoom=rExtGateH_2 image_xscale=6 y+=16 newArrowPosX=40 newArrowPosY=16
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=576 newMapY=304 toRoom=rExtGateH_7 newArrowPosX=8 x-=8

noteType=7 noteToRead="Claire,
This is how you treat me? I bring you into this world and you treat me like this? You think these grades are acceptable here? Get over here now, Claire!
Oh, your daddy's home now, everything will be sweetness and light."
if global.gateHProg>=17 {instance_destroy()} else if global.gateHProg<=15 {y+=256}

noteType=8 noteToRead="Claire,
You will not talk to your father about this. About what happened here.
You think I can take this lightly. You will stop locking your door. You will NOT avoid punishment for this!
Get downstairs, Claire!"
if global.gateHProg>=19 {instance_destroy()} else if global.gateHProg<=17 {y+=256}

noteType=11 noteToRead="Claire,
You've been coming home late again. Where have you been? Are you still seeing that worthless boyfriend of yours?
If you are not back home immediately after school..."
if global.gateHProg>=25 {instance_destroy()} else if global.gateHProg<=23 {y+=256}
